/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/loadimg.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/loadimg.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/loadimg.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/loadimg.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o loadimg.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libloadimg.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles/loadimg.dir/linkLibs.rsp
